allow: Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./angular.json'\); const b=d.projects['magnus-cms'].architect.build; console.log\('Main:', b.options.main\); console.log\('\\nFileReplacements:'\); \(b.options.fileReplacements||[]\).forEach\(r=>console.log\(' ',r.replace,'->',r.with\)\); console.log\('\\nConfigurations:'\); Object.entries\(b.configurations||{}\).forEach\(\([k,v]\)=>{console.log\('  '+k+':'\); if\(v.fileReplacements\) v.fileReplacements.forEach\(r=>console.log\('    replace:',r.replace,'->',r.with\)\); if\(v.main\) console.log\('    main:',v.main\);}\)")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./angular.json'\); const b=d.projects['magnus-backoffice'].architect.build; console.log\('Main:', b.options.browser || b.options.main\); console.log\('\\nFileReplacements \(options\):'\); \(b.options.fileReplacements||[]\).forEach\(r=>console.log\(' ',r.replace,'->',r.with\)\); const configs=b.configurations||{}; Object.entries\(configs\).forEach\(\([k,v]\)=>{console.log\('\\nConfig ['+k+']:'\); if\(v.fileReplacements\) v.fileReplacements.forEach\(r=>console.log\('    replace:',r.replace,'->',r.with\)\); if\(v.main\) console.log\('    main:',v.main\); if\(v.browser\) console.log\('    browser:',v.browser\);}\)")
Bash(node -e "const c = require\('./angular.json'\); const configs = c.projects['magnus-backoffice'].architect.serve.configurations; console.log\(JSON.stringify\(configs, null, 2\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const c = require\('./angular.json'\); const configs = c.projects['magnus-backoffice'].architect.build.configurations; console.log\(JSON.stringify\(configs, null, 2\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const c = require\('./angular.json'\); const serve = c.projects['magnus-backoffice'].architect.serve; console.log\(JSON.stringify\(serve, null, 2\)\)")
